tools.name: mcp_bulk_file_writer
tools.description: Write multiple files simultaneously for improved performance. Handles bulk operations efficiently with atomic writes.

content.description: Raw text content for the file

tools.name: plan
tools.description: Generate or update a structured implementation plan based on chat history. Writes to /app/plan.md.

thought.description: Initial thought or context for the plan

tools.name: todo_write
tools.description: Create and manage a structured task list for the coding session. Tracks progress using pending, in_progress, completed, cancelled.

tools.name: testing_agent_v3
tools.description: Expert testing agent that helps test backend and frontend using test cases, curl, playwright script and browser automation.

task.description: Detailed task containing original problem statement, features to test, testing type, etc. in JSON format

tools.name: design_agent
tools.description: Specializes in creating top-tier UI/UX design guidelines for any web experience. Produces a clear blueprint for implementation.

task.description: Detailed task containing problem statement, app type, target audience, and key functionalities

tools.name: troubleshoot_agent
tools.description: Provides deep technical root cause analysis (RCA) for persistent errors and system issues with read-only access (10 steps max).

task.description: ISSUE, COMPONENT, ERROR_MESSAGES, RECENT_ACTIONS, PREVIOUS_FIX_ATTEMPTS, RELEVANT_FILES

tools.name: image_selector_tool
tools.description: Fetch images from unsplash.com and/or pexels.com based on search keywords and color filters.

color.description: Optional color filter (black, white, red, etc.)

tools.name: integration_playbook_expert_v2
tools.description: Creates comprehensive, step-by-step playbook for integrating third-party APIs and services (OpenAI, Stripe, Auth0, etc.).

tools.name: emergent_integrations_manager
tools.description: Get the Emergent LLM key for llm integration (openai, anthropic, google).

tools.name: mcp_execute_bash
tools.description: Execute bash commands with full shell features (foreground/background, timeout, cwd).

tools.name: mcp_search_replace
tools.description: Search and replace exact string in file. Preserves formatting.

tools.name: mcp_view_file
tools.description: View file or directory contents (max 2000 lines).

tools.name: mcp_view_bulk
tools.description: View multiple files or directories in sequence.

tools.name: mcp_glob_files
tools.description: Fast file pattern matching using glob patterns (respects .gitignore).

tools.name: mcp_insert_text
tools.description: Insert text at a specific line number in a file.

tools.name: mcp_create_file
tools.description: Create a new file with specified content.

tools.name: mcp_lint_python
tools.description: Python linting using ruff. Auto-fixes safe issues.

tools.name: mcp_lint_javascript
tools.description: JavaScript/TypeScript linting using ESLint. Auto-fixes safe issues.

tools.name: mcp_screenshot_tool
tools.description: Execute Playwright script to take screenshot of webpage.

tools.name: web_search_tool_v2
tools.description: Search the web for programming, APIs, versions, bugs, and current information.

tools.name: crawl_tool
tools.description: Scrape/extract complete content from specific webpages.

tools.name: analyze_file_tool
tools.description: AI-powered analysis on document files for insights and patterns.

tools.name: extract_file_tool
tools.description: Extract specific structured data from document files.

tools.name: get_assets_tool
tools.description: Retrieve attached assets from the database for the current job/run.

tools.name: ask_human
tools.description: Ask human user for clarification, additional info, or confirmation.

tools.name: think
tools.description: Append thought to log (analyzing, planning, reasoning).

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Provide concise summary for clarity and handoff.

tools.name: support_agent
tools.description: Handle questions about Emergent capabilities, platform topics, refunds.

tools.name: deployment_agent
tools.description: Expert agent to debug native deployment issues on Emergent.
